commentaries.author: Alexander of Alexandria
commentaries.content: They go about the cities, attempting nothing else but that under the mark of friendship and the name of peace, by their hypocrisy and blandishments, they may give and receive letters, to deceive by means of these a few "silly women, and laden with sins, who have been led captive by them"

commentaries.author: Ignatius of Antioch
commentaries.content: Who are "lovers of pleasure, and not lovers of God, having a form of godliness, but denying the power thereof."

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
